security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
The system does not employ any form of rate limiting or CAPTCHA to mitigate against automated attacks

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation. Implement rate limiting and CAPTCHA.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be tampered with without sufficient integrity checks.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not have tamper-proof mechanisms to verify vote data integrity.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of the vote data before processing.
The actor is able to intercept and modify the vote data in transit.

mitigation.strategy: Implement cryptographic hashing or digital signatures to ensure the integrity of vote data.

description: An attacker may alter vote data in transit to manipulate the outcome of the governance process.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes can be submitted anonymously without traceability.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The voting system does not track the origin of individual votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not require user identification for voting.
The system does not store IP addresses or other identifying information associated with votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure identification system with audit logging of vote submissions.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their involvement.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote information may be leaked due to insecure data handling.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not fully protect the confidentiality of votes before or after aggregation.

assumptions: The system does not use end-to-end encryption for vote messages.
The database storing vote information is not properly secured.

mitigation.strategy: Implement end-to-end encryption and secure database management practices.

description: An attacker may gain access to sensitive vote information before the aggregation process.
